questions.prompt: I really ____ my grandmother when I stay away from home for too long.
questions.explain: 這裡 miss 是「想念」，不是「錯過」。要靠上下文判斷字義。

questions.prompt: ____ he was sick, he still came to school.
questions.explain: 前後意思相反：雖然生病，還是來上學，所以用 Although。

questions.prompt: English ____ in many countries around the world.
questions.explain: 英文是「被說」的語言，所以要用 is spoken。

questions.prompt: The pizza is ____ big. I don’t think the five of us can finish it.
questions.explain: quite big 表示「相當大」，語意最通順。either 和 neither 不用來修飾 big。

questions.prompt: Ben doesn’t like math, and I don’t, ____.
questions.explain: 否定句句尾附和用 either。too 只用在肯定附和。

questions.prompt: Peter got many answers wrong, so the teacher asked him to ____ them.
questions.explain: 題目答錯很多，老師會叫他「更正」答案，所以選 correct。

questions.prompt: We can either ____ at home or go to the movie theater.
questions.explain: can 後面要接原形動詞，且 either...or... 兩邊要平行，所以是 stay / go。

questions.prompt: Not only the students but also the teacher ____ surprised by the news.
questions.explain: 靠近動詞的是 the teacher，單數，所以用 is。

questions.prompt: Your answer is ____. You can go on to the next question.
questions.explain: 這裡 correct 是形容詞，表示「正確的」。

questions.prompt: She wants ____ to the party this Saturday.
questions.explain: want 後面若表示「想被邀請」，要用 to be invited。
